title: Gate-state: Thermal curation continuation remains soft-only
body: Gate-state: active queue is empty; only stale Feathered/Torrid claims are present; git status remains dirty from Thermal curation plus inherited .claude/settings.json; practice:fitness:informational reports SOFT only (20 soft, 21 healthy; hard 0, critical 0). No whole-repo pnpm check elected for this docs-only curation slice; targeted validation will run after edits.
